channel.title: guide on Andy
channel.description: Recent content in guide on Andy

item.title: Insuring Yourself Against Undesirable Events
item.description: According to Oxford Languages, the definition of insurance is:1 an arrangement by which a company or the state undertakes to provide a guarantee of compensation for specified loss, damage, illness, or death in return for payment of a specified premium. a thing protecting against a possible eventuality. I may be coming across as pedantic by quoting the definition, but I find it necessary since the term ‘insurance’ seems to have been conflated with savings and investments.

item.title: Guide to Managing Your Personal Finances
item.description: Adulting is a daunting task. When I first started out, I was intimidated. There was simply so much I didn’t know. I read up a lot, and made mistakes along the way. I am writing this guide for 2 reasons: To distill my thoughts To help those who feel lost The opinions I express are my own, and I am certainly no expert. This guide is meant to give you a basic overview of how you can manage the different aspects of your personal finance.
